title: phegopteris subaurita
intro: Phegopteris subaurita, also known as the auriculated fern, is a type of flowering plant in the Phegopteris genus that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Phegopteris subaurita include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat hypertension, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to improve overall cardiovascular health. Phegopteris subaurita can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
